title: Landlocked by Default: The Economic Geography of Alberta's Connectivity Crisis

yaml.title: Landlocked by Default: The Economic Geography of Alberta's Connectivity Crisis
yaml.description: Alberta sits deep within the North American continent, far from tidewater yet tightly connected to global markets. This article examines how pipelines, railways, and trade corridors overcome the constraints of a landlocked geography.

language.appendix-attribution-cite-as: For attribution, please cite this work as:
